input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.5.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.5.2.2
            TITLE: the final drivetrain shield must:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.5.2.2: The final drivetrain shield must:
T.5.2.2 The final drivetrain shield must: 
a. Be made with solid material (not perforated)  
b. Cover the chain or belt from the drive sprocket to the driven sprocket/chain wheel/belt 
or pulley  
c. Start and end no higher than parallel to the lowest point of the chain wheel/belt/pulley: 
 
d. Cover the bottom of the chain or belt or rotating component when fuel, brake lines 
T.3.1.8, control, pressurized, electrical components are located below

final_answer: T.5.2.2 The final drivetrain shield must: a. Be made with solid material (not perforated) b. Cover the chain or belt from the drive sprocket to the driven sprocket/chain wheel/belt or pulley c. Start and end no higher than parallel to the lowest point of the chain wheel/belt/pulley: d. Cover the bottom of the chain or belt or rotating component when fuel, brake lines T.3.1.8, control, pressurized, electrical components are located below
